books.en: The Book of Purification and its Sunnah
The Book of the Adhan and the Sunnah Regarding It
The Book On The Mosques And The Congregations
Establishing the Prayer and the Sunnah Regarding Them

collection_intro.en: Sunan Ibn Majah is a collection of hadith compiled by Imam Muhammad bin Yazid Ibn Majah al-Qazvini (rahimahullah). It is widely considered to be the sixth of the six canonical collection of hadith (Kutub as-Sittah) of the Sunnah of the Prophet (ﷺ). It consists of 4341 ahadith in 37 books.
